title: Creative Delight
description: This is a Modpack aimed at low to mid PCs with Create and Farmer's Delight as the main mods.
body:
This is a Modpack aimed at low to mid PCs with **Create** and **Farmer's Delight** as the main mods. Main focus is:

- Create mod! Create contraption to conquer the WORLD!
  - Create addons: CONQUER THE WORLD BETTER!
    - Steam N' Rails: WITH TRAAAINS!
    - Decorative Addons: WITH STYYYYLLLLE!!
    - Enchantment Industry: WITH GLOWING STUFF!!!
    - JetPacks: WHILE FLYING!!!!
    - Tom's Simple Storage: NEATLY!!!!!


- Farmer's Delight Refabricated: need not be hungry!
  - Slice & Dice: Create Integration
  - Spice of Fabric: A Gourmet's Power trip!
  - Create Food: For OPness!

  
- Macaw's Building Set: to look nice
   - Rechiseled


- Terralith: to see good things!
   - Repurposed Structures
   - BetterEnd
   - BetterNether


- and Other QOL mods:
  - Chalk: never get lost caving
  - Horseshoes: horses are now a viable transport option!
  - You're in grave danger: Careful of graverobbers!
  - Backpacked: you may be pickpocketed. 
  - Map Atlas: NOT Antique Atlas 4.
  - Quiver: I love bows.
  - EMI: a good imitaton.
  - and more....
  
Built upon the Fabulous: Fabulously Optimized

Made for my personal server.

This mod pack contains:

- Fusion
- Borderless Mining
- Moonlight
- Backpacked
- Entity Texture Features
- Zoomify
- Entity Model Features
